title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness simplifies agent deployment by replacing container and orchestration setup with JSON config and system prompts. It provides isolated VM environments per session, persistent storage, cross-session memory, hot-swappable models and tools, and built-in integrations with browser, code interpreter, and observability tools.
